name: fixit-ai-agent-root
description: Root orchestrator for the FIXIT AI AGENT platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mcp_server
scripts.dev:agent: cd agent && uv run uvicorn app.fast_api_app:app --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,AGENT" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:agent"
